products.name: Apple iPhone 15
products.overview: Premium Apple smartphone with A16 Bionic chip and dynamic island display.
products.long_description: The iPhone 15 features Apple's powerful A16 Bionic processor, a stunning Super Retina XDR display, and an improved dual-camera system with enhanced low-light performance. It offers smooth performance, long battery life, and a sleek design with USB-C support.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy S24
products.overview: Flagship Samsung phone with AI features and powerful Snapdragon processor.
products.long_description: The Samsung Galaxy S24 comes with advanced AI capabilities, a high-performance Snapdragon processor, and a stunning AMOLED display. It delivers excellent camera quality, long battery life, and premium design suitable for everyday and professional use.

products.name: OnePlus 12
products.overview: High-performance flagship with fast charging and smooth UI.
products.long_description: OnePlus 12 features the Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 chipset, ultra-fast charging, and a fluid AMOLED display with high refresh rate. It offers a clean OxygenOS experience, strong battery backup, and a premium camera setup.

products.name: Xiaomi 14
products.overview: Compact flagship with Leica-powered camera system.
products.long_description: Xiaomi 14 offers a powerful Snapdragon chipset and a Leica-tuned camera system for professional-grade photography. It features a premium design, fast charging, and a vibrant AMOLED display.

products.name: Realme GT 6
products.overview: Performance-focused phone with stylish design and fast charging.
products.long_description: Realme GT 6 delivers high-speed performance with a powerful processor, fast charging capabilities, and a modern design. It is ideal for gamers and heavy users looking for value.

products.name: iQOO Neo 9 Pro
products.long_description: The iQOO Neo 9 Pro is designed for gamers, featuring a powerful processor, advanced cooling system, and ultra-smooth display. It ensures high frame rates and long gaming sessions without overheating.

products.name: Nothing Phone (2)
products.overview: Unique design phone with glyph interface flagship-level performance.
products.long_description: Nothing Phone (2) stands out with its transparent design and glyph lighting system. It offers a clean Android experience, solid performance, and good cameras.

products.name: Google Pixel 8
products.overview: AI-powered smartphone with best-in-class camera flagship-level performance.
products.long_description: Pixel 8 delivers exceptional photography using Google's AI algorithms. It offers a clean Android experience, strong security updates, and reliable performance.

products.name: Infinix Zero 30
products.overview: Affordable phone with strong camera features flagship-level performance.
products.long_description: Infinix Zero 30 offers a high-resolution camera, stylish design, and decent performance at a budget price, making it a good value-for-money device.

featured_products.name: Samsung Galaxy S24
featured_products.overview: Flagship Samsung phone with AI features and powerful Snapdragon processor.
featured_products.long_description: The Samsung Galaxy S24 comes with advanced AI capabilities, a high-performance Snapdragon processor, and a stunning AMOLED display. It delivers excellent camera quality, long battery life, and premium design suitable for everyday and professional use.

featured_products.name: OnePlus 12
featured_products.overview: High-performance flagship with fast charging and smooth UI.
featured_products.long_description: OnePlus 12 features the Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 chipset, ultra-fast charging, and a fluid AMOLED display with high refresh rate. It offers a clean OxygenOS experience, strong battery backup, and a premium camera setup.

featured_products.name: Google Pixel 8
featured_products.long_description: Pixel 8 delivers exceptional photography using Google's AI algorithms. It offers a clean Android experience, strong security updates, and reliable performance.

cartList.name: Apple iPhone 15
cartList.overview: Premium Apple smartphone with A16 Bionic chip and dynamic island display.
cartList.long_description: The iPhone 15 features Apple's powerful A16 Bionic processor, a stunning Super Retina XDR display, and an improved dual-camera system with enhanced low-light performance. It offers smooth performance, long battery life, and a sleek design with USB-C support.

cartList.name: Samsung Galaxy S24
cartList.overview: Flagship Samsung phone with AI features and powerful Snapdragon processor.
cartList.long_description: The Samsung Galaxy S24 comes with advanced AI capabilities, a high-performance Snapdragon processor, and a stunning AMOLED display. It delivers excellent camera quality, long battery life, and premium design suitable for everyday and professional use.
